name: Can family sue if I got lung disease from asbestos brought home from work?
description: Yes for secondary take-home asbestos exposure.[8]

mainEntity.name: Can family sue if I got lung disease from asbestos brought home from work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for secondary take-home asbestos exposure.[8]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, secondary exposure** claims against employers/manufacturers possible if they knew risks.[8]

Utah/Idaho recognize household claims.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Proof of take-home exposure
- Family diagnosis
- Employer negligence

**Practical guidance:** Gather laundry/work clothes evidence; file promptly.
Viable for spouses/kids.
